summary: CRITICAL: Missing test_license_checker.bats file breaks workflow at unit-test step. Workflow references file but it's not provided; workflow will fail immediately. TDD methodology not demonstrated (no failing tests written first per requirement). Script suppresses jq errors in parse_package_json (2>/dev/null), masking failures. Test harness validates summary text, not actual test output—fragile approach. Workflow lacks explicit permissions section. Error handling in script inconsistent (some functions return 1, others echo). run-tests.sh expects strings like 'Unit tests (bats)' from summary report, not real test results. Partial TDD shown in script design but core deliverable incomplete.
